title: Weekly Distribution Levels
author: const
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: Weekly Distribution Levels by const.
█ OVERVIEW Weekly Distribution Levels plots standard deviation bands around the weekly open price, showing where the current week's move stands relative to its historical distribution.
It answers the question: "How far has price moved this week compared to what's normal?" Works on any instrument — futures, stocks, forex, crypto.
Everything is computed dynamically from the chart's own price history.
